offer: For property managers processing 5–15 lease statements/month, inaccurate statements cause cash flow gaps. We automatically generate statements instead of manual statement generation.
problem: Inaccurate or delayed lease payment statements
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where property managers seek help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Join community forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try template-based statement generation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as reusable templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing lease data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
